name: Collect data from cloud service via API using credentials
synonyms: Cloud Data Collection via RESTful API
details: API-based forensic acquisition of cloud data using the officially supported API of the provider can provide additional details and structure that is not available via other access methods. Requests may target public or undocumented endpoints identified via network observation or reverse engineering. Returned responses may include artifacts such as messages, file metadata, activity logs, and identity attributes. Analysts may use traffic capture tools or instrumentation to extract and store this data for forensic or intelligence purposes, both reactively and proactively.

references.relevance_summary_280: Open-source tool that implements this technique by inspecting and tracking RESTful API traffic from cloud client applications.
Proposes a hybrid cloud data acquisition approach that combines API-based collection with other methods.
Early example of API-based forensic acquisition of cloud user data, applied to the Amazon Alexa ecosystem.
